race.comment: REGALADE (5) made an encouraging debut last time out, finishing 2.5 lengths from the winner in fourth over 1243m at Geelong. Open to sharp improvement and can get off the mark this time with the blinkers going on. COSMIC DYNASTY (9) returned from a break last start with a moderate fifth over 1200m at Mornington after giving away a big start. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. ANALYTICAL (1) was prominent at the corner and finished second last start at the first run for the new stable. He can only be better for that. Debutant ALWAYS FREE (8) looks best of the rest and strips fitter for a jumpout.
